payouts.title: Seller payout settings
payouts.subtitle: Connect an independent payout account for this seller. After buyers pay, Stripe will settle funds to this connected account and then send payouts to the linked bank account.
payouts.emptyState: No Stripe payout account has been created yet. Start onboarding and Stripe will guide this seller through profile, payment capability, and bank-account setup.

alerts.intro: When Stripe reports restrictions, disconnections, or capability issues, this section surfaces the highest-priority fix first. Resolve these blockers before relying on the progress and general guidance below.

disconnected.title: The payout account is disconnected
disconnected.description: The connected account was deleted or disconnected, so new orders cannot keep using seller-specific payout routing.
disconnected.detail: Start Stripe payout setup again to restore the account link required for seller-specific payouts.

restricted.title: The payout account is restricted
restricted.description: Stripe detected past-due or restricted items on this account that can affect charging, refunds, or payouts.
restricted.detail: Re-enter Stripe payout setup first, resolve the blocked items, and then sync status again here.

currentlyDue.title: More information is still required
currentlyDue.description: Stripe is still waiting for additional details or verification results, so capabilities may not be fully active yet.
currentlyDue.detail: Continue the onboarding flow and prioritize the currently due items before syncing again.

chargesReview.title: Charge capability is still under review
chargesReview.description: The required details are already submitted, but Stripe has not fully enabled charging yet.
chargesReview.detail: Wait for Stripe's review to finish, then use “Sync Stripe status” to refresh capabilities.

payoutsPending.title: Payout capability is not active yet
payoutsPending.description: This account can already charge, but Stripe has not fully enabled payouts to the linked bank account.
payoutsPending.detail: Check bank-account and payout settings in the Stripe Express Dashboard, then sync again here.

guide.overview: This page manages the seller's Stripe Connect payout account, not an in-app balance. After buyers pay, Stripe books funds to the connected account first and then sends payouts to the linked bank account on Stripe's payout schedule.

flowSteps.start: On first setup, choose “Start Stripe payout onboarding” and finish profile, business, and bank-account details.
flowSteps.sync: After returning from Stripe, run “Sync Stripe status” once and treat the capabilities and requirements shown here as the latest source of truth.
flowSteps.manage: For day-to-day payout checks, bank updates, or extra verification, use the Stripe Express Dashboard first.

statusHelp.NOT_STARTED: No account or onboarding exists yet, so seller-specific Stripe routing is not active.
statusHelp.PENDING: The account exists, but Stripe is still waiting for more information or capability activation.
statusHelp.RESTRICTED: There are past-due or restricted items that can block charging or payouts and should be handled first.
statusHelp.ACTIVE: Charges and payouts are both enabled, so orders can flow normally while Stripe handles payouts.
statusHelp.DISCONNECTED: The account was disconnected or deleted and must be linked again before seller-specific payouts can resume.

summary.notStarted: No seller payout account exists yet. Start Stripe onboarding before seller-specific payout routing can go live.
summary.disconnected: This payout account is disconnected. Stripe cannot keep seller-specific charges and payouts running until it is linked again.
summary.pastDue: Stripe still has past-due requirements for this account. Clear the blocked items first, then sync again to confirm capability recovery.
summary.details: Onboarding is not finished yet. Complete Stripe's required profile and bank-account details, then sync status here again.
summary.review: Core details are already submitted. The current phase is mainly waiting for Stripe to enable charge capabilities, so sync again after review completes.
summary.payouts: Charging is already enabled, but payout capability is not fully active yet. Wait for Stripe to finish and sync again after returning.
summary.active: Stripe Connect onboarding is complete and seller-specific charging and payouts are now active.

account.label: Create the seller payout account
account.todo: Start Stripe onboarding first so the seller's connected account can be created.
account.done: The seller's Stripe Connect account already exists and is ready for more details or status checks.
account.attention: The previous payout account is disconnected and must be linked again.

details.label: Submit profile and bank details
details.todo: Create the payout account first, then finish identity, business, and bank-account details in Stripe.
details.current: The account still does not satisfy Stripe's current requirements. Finish the missing details, then sync again.
details.done: The core profile and onboarding form are already submitted, so the next concern is capability activation.
details.attention: There are past-due or restricted requirements that must be fixed before continuing.

charges.label: Enable charging
charges.todo: Stripe starts enabling charge capability after the required details are submitted.
charges.current: Stripe is still reviewing or waiting for more information, so charge capability is not fully live yet.
charges.done: This seller account can already accept charges and receive Connect-routed order funds.
charges.attention: The blocked items above are affecting charge capability and need to be cleared first.

payouts.label: Enable payouts
payouts.todo: Stripe can continue enabling bank payouts after charge capability is ready.
payouts.current: Payout capability is still waiting to become active. Keep syncing until the account shows payouts enabled.
payouts.done: Payouts are enabled and Stripe can send funds to the linked bank account on schedule.
payouts.attention: The current restrictions are affecting payouts, so clear those blockers first.

fields.bankUnavailable: No bank summary is available yet. Confirm the linked bank account inside the Stripe Express Dashboard.

hints.active: This seller account can already charge and receive payouts. You can still open the Stripe Express Dashboard to review payout timing, submit more information, or update bank details.
hints.pending: This seller account is not fully enabled yet. Continue Stripe onboarding, then sync again after returning to confirm whether capabilities are live.

messages.returned: Returned from Stripe and refreshed the latest account status.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load the payout account. Please try again later.
